data.chapter_title_en: Invocations for when you meet an adversary or a powerful ruler.
data.arabic_text: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَجْعَلُكَ فِي نُحُورِهِم، وَنَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شُرُورِهِمْ)).
data.english_text: (O Allah, we place You before them and we take refuge in You from their evil.)
data.transliteration: (Allahumma inna najAAaluka fee nuhoorihim wanaAAoothu bika min shuroorihim.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Allahumma inna najAAaluka fee nuhoorihim wanaAAoothu bika min shuroorihim.)
